FlavourText.original:
They clawed their way up from the agonising depths of nonexistence,
breathing deep with joy the exquisite light of meaning.
FlavourText.zh_cn:
它们在不曾存在的深渊中挣扎着爬行，
为一缕意义的光辉而欢欣鼓舞。

group.original: Passives in Radius of {Passive Skill} can be Allocated without being connected to your tree

translation.zh_cn:
{Passive Skill} 范围内的天赋可以在
未连结至天赋树的情况下配置
translation.zh_tw: 範圍 {Passive Skill} 內的天賦可以在沒有連結你的天賦樹下被配置
